properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'll worship at Your throne Whisper my own love song With all my heart I'll sing For You, my dad and King

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'll live for all my days To put a smile on Your face And when we finally meet It'll be for eternity

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And oh, how wide You open up Your arms When I need Your love And how far You would come If ever I was lost

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You said that all You feel for me Is undying love That You showed me through the cross

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'll worship You, my God I'll worship You, my God I love You, I love You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Forever I will sing Forever I will be with You I'll be with You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I'll worship You, my God I'll worship You, my God I love You and I love You
